CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, event_date DateTime);
SELECT monthName(event_date) AS month FROM another_table WHERE id = 1;
WITH toDateTime('2023-12-25 00:00:00') AS holiday_date SELECT monthName(holiday_date) AS holiday_month;
SELECT monthName(min(event_date)) AS earliest_month FROM test_dates;
SELECT mt.month, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT monthName(event_date) AS month FROM test_dates) AS mt GROUP BY month;
SELECT mt.month, COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT monthName(event_date) AS month FROM test_dates UNION ALL SELECT monthName(event_date) FROM another_table) AS mt GROUP BY month;
WITH (SELECT toDateTime('2021-05-01 00:00:00')) AS new_date SELECT monthName(new_date) AS new_month;
SELECT event_date, monthName(event_date) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date < now();
